station_code: Must match an existing station code in INMACOM database
value: Primary reporting value — must match the selected unit
unit: % | masl | Mm³  (% = percentage of full supply capacity; masl = metres above sea level; Mm³ = million m³)
level_masl: Current water level in metres above sea level (always fill if known)
storage_mm3: Storage volume in million cubic metres (optional)
spilling: Yes | No — is the dam currently spilling?
turbine_release_m3s: Turbine / power-generation release rate in m³/s (optional)
